title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud Spanner now supports hybrid search combining full-text and vector search for AI-powered applications. The feature integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to enable retrieval-augmented generation and contextual search at scale.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Google Cloud Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search within a single database for AI-powered applications. The capability integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to support retrieval-augmented generation and contextual search at scale. The takeaway is that Spanner can now serve both keyword and semantic retrieval, giving AI agents richer context drawn from operational data.
